markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on a new content strategy to improve organic conversions.](https://fathom.video/share/i5ENVtksrQ9Hp93AdmBQBgWxGg5sAvTE?tab=summary&timestamp=387.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**New Content Funnel:** A new strategy will align content with user intent (Awareness → Consideration → Decision → Validation), using blogs for top-funnel traffic and dedicated tour pages for conversions.](https://fathom.video/share/i5ENVtksrQ9Hp93AdmBQBgWxGg5sAvTE?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [**Blog Redesign:** Blogs will be redesigned to place conversion elements (e.g., tour cards, CTAs) above the fold, capturing users before they scroll away.](https://fathom.video/share/i5ENVtksrQ9Hp93AdmBQBgWxGg5sAvTE?tab=summary&timestamp=687.0)
  - [**SEO Audit:** An SEO audit will resolve keyword cannibalization (blogs outranking tour pages) and optimize tour pages for high-intent commercial keywords.](https://fathom.video/share/i5ENVtksrQ9Hp93AdmBQBgWxGg5sAvTE?tab=summary&timestamp=766.0)
  - [**AI Search Growth:** AI search traffic grew from \~9k to \~119k sessions, creating a new high-intent awareness channel to target with content.](https://fathom.video/share/i5ENVtksrQ9Hp93AdmBQBgWxGg5sAvTE?tab=summary&timestamp=1846.0)

## Topics

### Problem: Blog Traffic Isn't Converting

  - [**Keyword Cannibalization:** Blogs outrank tour pages for commercial keywords, diverting high-intent traffic from conversion-focused pages.](https://fathom.video/share/i5ENVtksrQ9Hp93AdmBQBgWxGg5sAvTE?tab=summary&timestamp=766.0)
  - [**Poor UX:** The current blog layout pushes conversion elements below the fold, causing high bounce rates as users leave before seeing them.](https://fathom.video/share/i5ENVtksrQ9Hp93AdmBQBgWxGg5sAvTE?tab=summary&timestamp=687.0)
  - [**Weather Impact (Cancun):** High wind during Nov–Mar forces port closures, disrupting catamaran tours and creating guest rescheduling challenges.](https://fathom.video/share/i5ENVtksrQ9Hp93AdmBQBgWxGg5sAvTE?tab=summary&timestamp=93.0)

### Solution: New Content Funnel & Blog Redesign

  - [**Content Funnel:** Align content with user intent to guide them from research to purchase.](https://fathom.video/share/i5ENVtksrQ9Hp93AdmBQBgWxGg5sAvTE?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
      - [**Awareness:** Informational blogs (e.g., "Weather in Cancun") build brand awareness.](https://fathom.video/share/i5ENVtksrQ9Hp93AdmBQBgWxGg5sAvTE?tab=summary&timestamp=536.0)
      - [**Consideration:** Blogs on attractions (e.g., "Things to Do") link to relevant tour pages.](https://fathom.video/share/i5ENVtksrQ9Hp93AdmBQBgWxGg5sAvTE?tab=summary&timestamp=1450.0)
      - [**Decision:** Tour pages and commercial blogs ("Best Tours") drive direct conversions.](https://fathom.video/share/i5ENVtksrQ9Hp93AdmBQBgWxGg5sAvTE?tab=summary&timestamp=502.0)
  - [**Blog Redesign:** Place conversion elements above the fold.](https://fathom.video/share/i5ENVtksrQ9Hp93AdmBQBgWxGg5sAvTE?tab=summary&timestamp=687.0)
      - [**Desktop:** Replace the "Related Articles" sidebar with "Recommended Tours."](https://fathom.video/share/i5ENVtksrQ9Hp93AdmBQBgWxGg5sAvTE?tab=summary&timestamp=1032.0)
      - [**Mobile:** Swap the order of the blog and tour carousels at the bottom.](https://fathom.video/share/i5ENVtksrQ9Hp93AdmBQBgWxGg5sAvTE?tab=summary&timestamp=1032.0)
      - [**In-Content CTAs:** Add compact, relevant CTAs (e.g., "Add to Cart") within commercial blogs.](https://fathom.video/share/i5ENVtksrQ9Hp93AdmBQBgWxGg5sAvTE?tab=summary&timestamp=1305.0)

### Solution: SEO Audit & Optimization

  - [**Goal:** Ensure tour pages rank highest for all commercial keywords.](https://fathom.video/share/i5ENVtksrQ9Hp93AdmBQBgWxGg5sAvTE?tab=summary&timestamp=829.0)
  - [**On-Page SEO:** Optimize tour pages with commercial terms to improve search visibility.](https://fathom.video/share/i5ENVtksrQ9Hp93AdmBQBgWxGg5sAvTE?tab=summary&timestamp=1700.0)
  - [**Off-Page SEO:** Build backlinks to tour pages from travel sites to signal authority to Google.](https://fathom.video/share/i5ENVtksrQ9Hp93AdmBQBgWxGg5sAvTE?tab=summary&timestamp=859.0)
  - [**Prioritization:** Focus optimization on top-performing pages (top 20 blogs & tours) to maximize impact.](https://fathom.video/share/i5ENVtksrQ9Hp93AdmBQBgWxGg5sAvTE?tab=summary&timestamp=2045.0)

### New Opportunity: AI Search

  - [**Growth:** AI search traffic grew from \~9k to \~119k sessions, creating a new high-intent awareness channel.](https://fathom.video/share/i5ENVtksrQ9Hp93AdmBQBgWxGg5sAvTE?tab=summary&timestamp=1846.0)
  - [**Tracking:** Isabel tracks AI search traffic (ChatGPT, Perplexity, etc.) in Google Analytics via a custom segment.](https://fathom.video/share/i5ENVtksrQ9Hp93AdmBQBgWxGg5sAvTE?tab=summary&timestamp=1932.0)
  - [**Action:** Structure content to be easily cited by AI models, driving more traffic to the website.](https://fathom.video/share/i5ENVtksrQ9Hp93AdmBQBgWxGg5sAvTE?tab=summary&timestamp=1996.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Saul:**](https://fathom.video/share/i5ENVtksrQ9Hp93AdmBQBgWxGg5sAvTE?tab=summary&timestamp=1290.0)
      - [Create blog redesign mock-ups and consult IT (Oscar) on implementation.](https://fathom.video/share/i5ENVtksrQ9Hp93AdmBQBgWxGg5sAvTE?tab=summary&timestamp=1290.0)
      - [Investigate exporting tour data (name, price, audience) from Sanity or Algolia.](https://fathom.video/share/i5ENVtksrQ9Hp93AdmBQBgWxGg5sAvTE?tab=summary&timestamp=1647.0)
  - [**Jo:**](https://fathom.video/share/i5ENVtksrQ9Hp93AdmBQBgWxGg5sAvTE?tab=summary&timestamp=2041.0)
      - [Refresh strategy docs and begin a deep-dive analysis on Vallarta.](https://fathom.video/share/i5ENVtksrQ9Hp93AdmBQBgWxGg5sAvTE?tab=summary&timestamp=2041.0)
      - [Share the full analysis in the next two weeks.](https://fathom.video/share/i5ENVtksrQ9Hp93AdmBQBgWxGg5sAvTE?tab=summary&timestamp=819.0)
  - [**Isabel:**](https://fathom.video/share/i5ENVtksrQ9Hp93AdmBQBgWxGg5sAvTE?tab=summary&timestamp=1846.0)
      - [Share the AI search tracking spreadsheet with Jo.](https://fathom.video/share/i5ENVtksrQ9Hp93AdmBQBgWxGg5sAvTE?tab=summary&timestamp=1846.0)
